calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Judgment Declaration Of Reza Eslaminia
Off Calendar Dec-07-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Judgment.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Dennis Charles Hyde, Esq. for Plaintiff: Murphy san Francisco Limited Partnership.
Defendant: Carol Osorio, present in pro per.
The Court ordered this matter off calendar, untimely filed and served.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-22-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-22-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly from Dept. 206 for a prove-up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks S. Ravinantapricha/R. Edwards, and CSR: Tony Vauhn.
Appearances: Dennis Hyde, Esq. For Plaintiff.
Defendant not present.
Plaintiff witness: Bartholomew Murphy, was sworn and examined.

The following documentary evidence were introduced on behalf of the plaintiff:
EXH. 1 - Rental Agreement ---------ID/EVID
EXH. 2 - 3 Day Notice to Pay/Quit--ID/EV

The Court hears testimony and grants judgment in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows: Restitution and Possession of 739 Haight # 301.
Principal amount of $2,287.76; cost pursuant to cost bill; for the total of $2,287.76
Counsel stipulated for return of the exhibit.
Judgment signed in open court.
